cards.meaning: **Queen of Pentacles** (upright) in the *Self* position speaks of nurturing, resourceful, grounded care. Its keywords — nurture, abundance, practicality, care — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Five of Wands** (reversed) in the *Mirror* position speaks of avoidable conflict, exhaustion, ego clashes. Its keywords — competition, friction, tension, conflict — color how this card is moving for you now.
**King of Cups** (upright) in the *Shadow* position speaks of emotional mastery held with calm. Its keywords — composure, balance, wisdom, diplomacy — color how this card is moving for you now.

cards.meaning: **Queen of Pentacles** (reversed) in the *Today* position speaks of self-neglect, or smothering. Its keywords — nurture, abundance, practicality, care — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Page of Wands** (upright) in the *You* position speaks of an eager spark; a free-spirited explorer. Its keywords — curiosity, enthusiasm, exploration, free spirit — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Three of Wands** (upright) in the *The Other* position speaks of foresight rewarded; horizons widening. Its keywords — foresight, expansion, progress, enterprise — color how this card is moving for you now.

**The Chariot** (upright) in the *The Bond* position speaks of victory through directed will and emotional self-command. Its keywords — will, direction, drive, mastery — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Ascendant in Cancer (house 1) — The Chariot working through identity and embodiment.

**The High Priestess** (upright) in the *The Lesson* position speaks of trust in the inner voice that knows before it can explain. Its keywords — intuition, mystery, inner knowing, stillness — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Moon in Sagittarius (house 6) — The High Priestess working through health, craft, devotion, and service.

**Ten of Cups** (upright) in the *The Becoming* position speaks of lasting emotional fulfillment and belonging. Its keywords — harmony, family, fulfillment, belonging — color how this card is moving for you now.

cards.meaning: **The World** (upright) in the *Self* position speaks of wholeness; a cycle completed and danced to its center. Its keywords — completion, wholeness, integration, fulfillment — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Saturn in Taurus (house 1) — The World working through identity and embodiment.

**Wheel of Fortune** (reversed) in the *Mirror* position speaks of resisting the turn, or blaming fate for everything. Its keywords — cycles, fate, turning point, expansion — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Jupiter in Aries (house 1) — Wheel of Fortune working through identity and embodiment.

**Ten of Pentacles** (upright) in the *Shadow* position speaks of lasting wealth, legacy, and rootedness. Its keywords — legacy, family, stability, completion — color how this card is moving for you now.

cards.meaning: **Four of Wands** (reversed) in the *Today* position speaks of a muted celebration or unstable foundations. Its keywords — celebration, harmony, home, milestone — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Ten of Pentacles** (upright) in the *You* position speaks of lasting wealth, legacy, and rootedness. Its keywords — legacy, family, stability, completion — color how this card is moving for you now.

**The Magician** (reversed) in the *The Other* position speaks of scattered energy, manipulation, or talent left unused. Its keywords — will, language, craft, manifestation — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Mercury in Capricorn (house 9) — The Magician working through belief, travel, and philosophy.

**King of Wands** (upright) in the *The Bond* position speaks of visionary leadership that inspires action. Its keywords — leadership, vision, boldness, mastery — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Four of Pentacles** (upright) in the *The Lesson* position speaks of stability and security held close. Its keywords — security, control, saving, holding — color how this card is moving for you now.
**Seven of Swords** (upright) in the *The Becoming* position speaks of strategy, cunning, acting alone. Its keywords — strategy, stealth, cunning, evasion — color how this card is moving for you now.
